title: Better Rails
body:
This mod aims to make rails more useful while keeping the functionality close to vanilla.

### Key Features:

Accelerator Rails are a new type of rail made from copper that allows minecarts to reach much higher speeds, but take longer to accelerate the minecart than powered rails. As the rails oxidise, their maximum speed decreases.

Minecarts will derail when reaching corners at high speeds, so minecarts need to be slowed before turning. Minecarts are also destroyed if they hit a wall too hard, dealing damage to any passengers.

Jumps! When a minecart reaches the top of a ramp at high speed, it will continue moving upwards.
